productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Men Solid Olive Kurtas
description: Style NoteAfter being forced to spend many hours every week in enclosing formals, relax in the evenings in this comfortable kurta from urban yoga. Transforming you into a stylish traditional man, this kurta can be paired with a snug pair of well fitted jeans and leather sandals.Product DetailsOlive green long kurta with a mandarin collar, has buttoned half placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, has a patch pocket on the left chestMaterial and Care100% cottonHand wash or machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low and dry in shade Use warm iron Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size 40
